title: Diabetes annual care documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports documenting event frequency, severity, precipitants, symptoms, treatment approach, glucose readings, medication context, awareness and risk factors.
examination.rationale: The exact risk-assessment section supports clinician-entered hypoglycaemia history, awareness, glucose readings, medicine context, precipitating factors, functional impact, examination, and concern.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting event frequency, severity, precipitants, symptoms, treatment approach, glucose readings, medication context, awareness and risk factors.

source.title: 6. Glycemic Goals, Hypoglycemia, and Hyperglycemic Crises: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

investigations.text: Includes hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and hypercholesterolaemia/hyperlipidaemia among the listed chronic conditions.
investigations.rationale: The exact DHA chronic-condition section supports recording already reviewed diabetes laboratory-monitoring context without ordering or interpreting a test.
investigations.evidence_extract: Includes hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and hypercholesterolaemia/hyperlipidaemia among the listed chronic conditions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

exact_section.heading: 5.1 Chronic conditions that could be managed virtually

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting clinician-discussed A1C or CGM goals, health and functional status, comorbidity, treatment risk, burden and shared preferences without automatically applying a numeric goal.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact individualised-goals section supports clinician-documented goals, treatment-burden discussion, questions, plan, and follow-up without creating a numeric target or treatment change.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting clinician-discussed A1C or CGM goals, health and functional status, comorbidity, treatment risk, burden and shared preferences without automatically applying a numeric goal.

source.title: 6. Glycemic Goals, Hypoglycemia, and Hyperglycemic Crises: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

follow_up.text: Supports clinician review of A1C and/or CGM metrics and an individualised assessment frequency without generating a target or interpretation.
follow_up.rationale: The exact ADA section supports clinician review of A1C or CGM status and individualised assessment frequency without generating a target or interpretation.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports clinician review of A1C and/or CGM metrics and an individualised assessment frequency without generating a target or interpretation.

source.title: 6. Glycemic Goals, Hypoglycemia, and Hyperglycemic Crises: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

source_limitations: Diabetes type, duration, complications, foot, eye, renal, cardiovascular, vaccination, medicine, targets, full annual-care schedule, referral, and interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.

All previously supported GP legacy-item mappings were conservatively removed because exact item identity, direct support, and item-specific applicability were not independently established under the fail-closed contract.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
